scenes.speech: Let's learn the ethics behind using AI correctly and safely!
scenes.title: AI Ethics

scenes.speech: The rules for using AI correctly!
scenes.title: What is AI Ethics?
scenes.content: AI ethics is about thinking through AI's impact on society and using it fairly, safely, and responsibly. It's about the relationship between technology and people!

scenes.title: Bias Problems
scenes.content: AI reflects the bias in its training data. A hiring AI trained mostly on male data unfairly disadvantaged women in real cases!

scenes.speech: Is it okay to give personal info to AI?
scenes.title: Privacy Protection
scenes.content: AI trains on massive personal data. What data to use and how to protect it is a major issue!

scenes.title: Fake News and Deepfakes
scenes.content: AI can generate videos of people saying things they never said (deepfakes) and fake news. Learning to spot them is essential!

scenes.speech: Will AI take away jobs? Let's think together
scenes.title: AI and Jobs
scenes.content: Simple tasks will be replaced by AI, but new jobs will emerge. Building skills to collaborate with AI is what matters!
scenes.highlight: ❌ Repetitive work ✅ Creative work ✅ AI management

scenes.speech: There's a movement to create AI rules!
scenes.title: AI Regulation and Laws
scenes.content: EU AI Act, Japan's AI Strategy... countries are creating AI rules. Building a safe and fair AI society requires regulation!
scenes.highlight: 🇪🇺 EU AI Act 🇯🇵 Japan AI Strategy

scenes.speech: What's the responsibility of AI developers?
scenes.title: Responsible AI Development
scenes.content: Fairness, transparency, safety, privacy... AI developers have a responsibility to uphold these values. Good tech comes from good hearts!

scenes.speech: We're all members of the AI society!
scenes.title: What We Can Do
scenes.content: Read information critically, question AI decisions, protect privacy... let's live wisely in the AI society as informed citizens!
scenes.highlight: 🧠 Critical thinking + 🔍 Verify info = Smart citizen

scenes.speech: You're becoming a thoughtful person about AI ethics!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
